inputs.name: productName
inputs.description: (required) the Product Name is the official name of the tool.

inputs.name: secondTitle
inputs.description: Second Title is an optional second text identifier of the tool.

inputs.name: showMenuButton
inputs.description: Whether to show the menu button

inputs.name: showVoiceInputAction
inputs.description:
Whether to show the voice input action button on
the right side of the tool header, when the mode is mobile
and the search input is expanded

outputs.name: logoClick
outputs.description: Event emitted when the default logo is clicked

outputs.name: menuClick
outputs.description: Event emitted when the menu button is clicked

outputs.name: menuCollapse
outputs.description:
Event emitted when user intends to collapse the menu.
Happens when user clicks `left arrow` key on the menu button
if on ltr or `right arrow` key if on rtl.

outputs.name: menuExpand
outputs.description:
Event emitted when user intends to expand the menu.
Happens when user clicks `right arrow` key on the menu button
if on ltr or `left arrow` key if on rtl.

outputs.name: microphoneClick
outputs.description: Event emitted when the microphone button is clicked
